body_original: Lyrics were to small, many of the words in the lyrics were wrong and the timing was off!
body_zh: 歌词显示得太小，歌词中有很多词是错的，而且歌词与音乐的时间也对不上！
cleaning_note: 原文中的 to 应为 too；按语义翻译，不改写原文。

body_original: Package came with a European style charging plug only.  Cannot charge it in the USA
body_zh: 包装里只有欧式充电插头，在美国无法给机器充电。
cleaning_note: 无须清洗；按原文直译。

body_original: I bought this for my office party. At home, it worked with the WIFI, it did not work at the party location (hotel ballroom WIFI), I used bluetooth and my phone.  The Karofun subscription did not have a 6 month free option (as indicated in the product description) so I paid.  A song listed as available would not play, not sure why that was.  YouTube App is shown on the machine but not preloaded, so I get a message that this is not available to me.  I do not find information about how to add this app, if that is possible.  I would be happier about this purchase if the instructions available, even if online, were less bare bones.
body_zh: 我买它是为了公司的聚会。在家里连接Wi-Fi时可以使用，但到了聚会地点（酒店宴会厅的Wi-Fi）就无法使用，所以我只能改用蓝牙和手机。产品描述中写着KaraFun有6个月免费使用期，但订阅时并没有这个选项，所以我付了费。有一首显示可用的歌曲却无法播放，我也不知道原因。机器上显示有YouTube应用，但实际上没有预装，我收到的提示是该功能对我不可用。我也找不到如何添加这个应用的信息，甚至不确定能否添加。如果使用说明——即使只是在线说明——不那么简陋，我会对这次购买更满意。
cleaning_note: KaraFun在原文中拼作Karofun；保留Wi-Fi环境变化、付费和应用不可用三个独立问题。

body_original: I would give it 0 stars if I could. Mics don't stay charged and it never works when you want to use it. How can they sell a karaoke machine where the mics never work. Tried plugging in my own and that also didn't work. Please don't waste your money. It was a gift that turned out horrible because we couldn't use it.
body_zh: 如果可以，我会给它0星。麦克风存不住电，每次想用时都无法工作。卡拉OK机的麦克风从来不能用，这样的产品怎么能拿来卖？我试着插入自己的麦克风，也同样无法使用。请不要浪费钱。这原本是一件礼物，结果因为根本用不了，体验非常糟糕。
cleaning_note: 保留强烈负面情绪和“内置麦克风、外接麦克风都失败”的范围。

title_original: AC DC usb c 300w charger Needed
body_original: I would’ve rated this five stars, however, the 300W AC DC usb c charging adapter shown in the inclosed mini instructions is not included and is back ordered or out of stock in stores and online.  You need a 18v charger 3.5 A that fits a flat opening to fit the enclosed USB C  attachment or the charger will overheat and start a potential fire or drain the battery .I cannot charge this machine, and I have ordered and returned several adapters that have barrel connectors, which is not what is needed for this machine.The manufacturer and distributors should include the correct charging device. Just giving a USB charging cable without having the proper plug to charge the machine has been a frustrating experience for me. ☹️I do not recommend buying this machine as you will not be able to charge it without the proper charging device, which I have been unable to find. Sent back this machine.
body_zh: 如果不是充电问题，我本来会给它5星。但是，随附的小型说明书中展示的300W AC/DC USB-C充电适配器并未包含在包装里，而且在线下和网上都处于延期交货或缺货状态。用户称需要一个18V、3.5A并能适配扁平接口和随附USB-C连接件的充电器，否则充电器可能过热、存在起火风险或耗尽电池。我无法给这台机器充电，已经购买并退回了好几个圆形插头的适配器，因为它们不适用于这台机器。制造商和经销商应该附带正确的充电设备。只提供USB充电线却没有合适的插头，让我非常沮丧。☹️ 我不建议购买，因为没有合适的充电设备就无法充电，而我一直找不到这种设备。最后我把机器退回了。
cleaning_note: 充电器规格和起火风险是评论者陈述，未被产品资料验证；翻译中用“用户称”避免把它改写成已证实事实。

body_original: Apps close out upon start despite only using for a week. Karafun closes out within 10 seconds of opening. Going to refund or get a new unit. Was very fun and good quality for the week used.
body_zh: 只用了一个星期，应用一启动就会退出。KaraFun打开后不到10秒就关闭了。我准备退款或更换一台新机器。正常使用的那一个星期里，它确实很好玩，品质也不错。
cleaning_note: 标题的 dies fast 结合正文指应用快速崩溃和短期失效，不翻译成电池耗电快。

body_original: A beautiful machine, but I wish it sounded better for the price. More volume than richness.
title_zh: 声音大不等于音质最好
body_zh: 机器外观很漂亮，但以这个价格来说，我希望它的声音表现更好。它的音量很大，但声音的丰富度不够。
cleaning_note: richness译为声音丰富度，不等同于低音。

title_original: Battery 🪫 sucks bad battery 🪫 not even charging
body_original: Battery 🪫 life is not good at all. I haven’t used at all. It’s still brand new. My battery 🪫 is charging at all. Battery is dead. When I plug in turn on but if I take it off it’s dead. I need my money back. They sent me worst defected product with battery. I thought charger problem n I bought new one but it was not same problem.
title_zh: 电池太差，甚至充不进电
body_zh: 电池续航完全不行。我根本还没怎么使用，机器仍然是全新的。原文写成“电池正在充电”，但结合上下文应是想说电池完全充不进电。电池已经没电了；插着电源时机器可以开机，一拔掉电源就断电。我需要退款。他们寄给我的是一台电池有严重缺陷的产品。我原以为是充电器的问题，还买了一个新的，但问题仍然一样。
cleaning_note: My battery is charging at all 与后文矛盾，判断可能漏写 not；译文显式说明该歧义，没有静默修正。

body_original: The machine has to stay plugged in, in order fot the mic to stay charge. a small laps when you play the music. We really like the sound but we have to remember to keep it plugged in at all times or we can’t use it.
body_zh: 机器必须一直插着电源，麦克风才能保持有电。播放音乐时会有一点延迟。我们很喜欢它的声音，但必须记得让机器始终接通电源，否则就无法使用。
cleaning_note: fot应为for，stay charge应为stay charged，small laps结合语境判断为small lag；这些修正只用于译文理解。

body_original: I have to say that I am very impressed by the quality sound and set up of this machine! I only wish the app on it wld play complete song and not just parcel.  The other apps are good. Have already had plenty enjoyable moments sharing and singing with family and friends.  Would definitely recommend to everyone that enjoys karaoke and music!
body_zh: 这台机器的音质和整体配置让我印象非常深刻！我只希望其中那个应用可以播放完整歌曲，而不是只播放片段。其他应用都不错。我已经和家人朋友一起唱歌、分享了很多愉快时光。一定会把它推荐给喜欢卡拉OK和音乐的人！
cleaning_note: wld按would理解；parcel结合上下文按partial/片段理解。

body_original: My only concern is the app, hoe they have a home screen button. Other than that, works great for me.
body_zh: 我唯一担心的是应用；我希望它有一个返回主屏幕的按钮。除此之外，对我来说都很好用。
cleaning_note: hoe结合语境判断为hope。

body_original: The sound quality is phenomenal and this thing is a ton of fun, but the YouTube integration isn't a YouTube app, it's just a regular browser window, so the functionality is really clunky.
body_zh: 音质非常出色，这台机器也非常好玩；但所谓的YouTube集成并不是YouTube应用，只是一个普通的浏览器窗口，因此操作起来很别扭。
cleaning_note: clunky译为操作别扭/不顺手，不扩大成系统故障。

body_original: I enjoy the karaoke, sound, and mics. I just don’t understand how to download apps for the amount of money it is I should be able to download YouTube instead of using Firefox. Also there are important missing functions like a home button to get back to the main screen. So other than figuring out the work arounds I enjoy it.
title_zh: 本来不该复杂，却偏偏很复杂
body_zh: 我喜欢它的卡拉OK功能、声音和麦克风。但以这个价格来说，我不明白为什么不能直接下载应用；我应该能够下载YouTube，而不是通过Firefox使用。它还缺少一些重要功能，例如返回主界面的Home按钮。除了必须自己摸索各种替代办法之外，我还是喜欢这台机器的。
cleaning_note: 标题是反讽表达，直译会丢失语气；workarounds译为替代办法。

title_original: Ikarao Smart Karaoke Machine Needs Apps
body_original: Overall, I like it and it works well. I would like to have the tablet portion work more like a regular android tablet to be able to download apps like Spotify or YouTube music instead of having to use to the website. Has a great sound and battery life is great.
title_zh: Ikarao智能卡拉OK机需要真正的应用
body_zh: 总体来说，我喜欢这台机器，它也运行得不错。我希望平板部分更像普通的Android平板，可以下载Spotify或YouTube Music等应用，而不是必须通过网站使用。它的声音很好，电池续航也很出色。
cleaning_note: 无须清洗；按原文直译。

title_original: A good buy but still lacks something
body_original: Almost perfect. Sound is excellent, very portable, plenty of connectivity options. Only thing that i think it lacks is the ability to control the machine remotely. Most input, specially in operating the applications installed need to be done manually through the touch screen tablet. I think it would be better if they make the apps installed controllable through our phones. Even the karaoke volume needs to be changed manually when using the apps. The only time you can control the volume is if you’re connected through bluetooth. But if you plan to project the tablet screen to your big tv bluetooth becomes pointless because the only thing you’ll see on your tv screen is the bluetooth connection screen and no lyrics or video whatsoever.
title_zh: 值得购买，但仍缺少一些功能
body_zh: 几乎完美。声音出色、非常便携，而且连接方式很多。我认为它唯一欠缺的是远程控制能力。大多数输入操作，尤其是操作已安装的应用，都必须在触屏平板上手动完成。如果能通过手机控制这些应用会更好。使用应用时，连卡拉OK音量都必须手动调整；只有通过蓝牙连接时才能远程控制音量。但如果想把平板画面投到大电视上，蓝牙模式就失去了意义，因为电视屏幕上只会显示蓝牙连接界面，完全没有歌词或视频。
cleaning_note: 保留“蓝牙控制音量”与“电视显示歌词”无法同时满足的条件关系。

body_original: Functionality is great. Sound is awesome. Lasts all night.But the app is slow and buggy. And the touch screen often doesn’t recognize my finger presses. That’s annoying.
title_zh: 很不错的便携式卡拉OK机
body_zh: 功能很好，声音也很棒，续航可以撑一整晚。但是应用运行缓慢而且有很多小故障，触摸屏也经常识别不到我的点击，这一点很烦人。
cleaning_note: buggy译为有小故障，不自动推断具体崩溃类型。

body_original: l swear this got to be the most amazing party system l have ever come across.This karaoke machine is a game-changer! The audio quality is top-notch, making it not just an outstanding Bluetooth speaker but also a full-fledged karaoke machine.We often bring microphones in a bag and keep our phones charged, but since we use phone to connect with our loved ones while we use it for Karaoke, it does ring or interrupt the song itself. So Handy and ready on the go! Very small in size, but very powerful and portable. My family  love this SO MUCH！ no need to go a Karaoke bar to sing there!
body_zh: 我敢说，这是我见过最惊艳的派对系统。这台卡拉OK机彻底改变了体验！音质一流，它不仅是一台出色的蓝牙音箱，也是一套完整的卡拉OK设备。过去我们会把麦克风装在袋子里，还要保证手机有电；而用手机唱卡拉OK时，亲友来电也会打断歌曲。现在这台机器随手就能用，非常方便！体积很小，但功率强、便于携带。我的家人非常喜欢它，再也不用专门去卡拉OK店唱歌了！
cleaning_note: 保留“释放手机、避免来电打断”这一具体价值，不只概括为便携。

body_original: This product truly delivers in sound and special effects!  From the first time turning the device on, we were blown away as to how easy it is to operate, as well as having an extensive library of songs to choose from, from three sources!  Will pass the word around to friends wanting a great karaoke machine!
body_zh: 这款产品在声音和特效方面确实名副其实！第一次开机时，它简单易用的操作就让我们非常惊喜，而且还能从三个来源选择大量歌曲。我会把它推荐给正在寻找优秀卡拉OK机的朋友！
cleaning_note: 无须清洗；按原文直译。

body_original: Worth the money! Took it to a party and we used it as a background music at first.  Then the singing started.  Everyone was amazed at the quality of music and the microphones too.  Happy with this purchase!
title_zh: 品质不错的便携式卡拉OK机
body_zh: 物有所值！我们把它带到聚会上，一开始用来播放背景音乐，后来大家开始唱歌。所有人都对音乐音质和麦克风表现感到惊喜。我对这次购买很满意！
cleaning_note: 无须清洗；按原文直译。

body_original: My daughter had a backyard wedding and the bluetooth option with speakers and wireless mic's worked beautifully.  After the ceremony, the machine was used for my daughter's hand selected playlist and later on when the party got moving, karaoke broke out and was a blast.  Highly recommended for any function where people love to party and sing!!!
body_zh: 我女儿举办了一场后院婚礼，这台机器的蓝牙、音箱和无线麦克风表现得非常好。仪式结束后，我们用它播放女儿亲自挑选的歌单；等聚会气氛热起来后，大家又开始唱卡拉OK，玩得非常尽兴。强烈推荐给任何喜欢聚会和唱歌的活动！
cleaning_note: function在此处指活动/场合，不译为产品功能。

title_original: Small package with a big punch!
body_original: My family absolutely loves this karaoke machine. It’s extremely convenient and portable for use anywhere.The LCD screen is more than big enough, and it can also display the lyrics on your television or other display device. The sound…amazing. Even if you don’t want to sink karaoke, you can use it as a boom box at small family functions just to listen to music. I have zero complaints! Awesome product!
body_zh: 我的家人非常喜欢这台卡拉OK机。它非常方便、便携，几乎可以在任何地方使用。LCD屏幕足够大，也可以把歌词显示到电视或其他显示设备上。声音表现非常惊艳。即使不想唱卡拉OK，也可以在小型家庭活动中把它当作音箱播放音乐。我完全没有不满，这是一款很棒的产品！
cleaning_note: sink karaoke结合上下文判断为sing karaoke。boom box译为音箱，family functions译为家庭活动。

body_original: This is absolutely a superior product. I have used it extensively at events and people are impressed. However, there was an issue that the aux port and speaker broke and I bought another one. I have not heard from Ikarao but it is such a superior product that getting a refund is not even in the cards. I rave about this product and is the best absolutely.
body_zh: 这绝对是一款出色的产品。我在很多活动中频繁使用它，大家都印象深刻。不过，它的AUX接口和扬声器后来坏了，所以我又买了一台。我还没有收到Ikarao的回复，但我仍然认为产品非常优秀，甚至完全没有考虑退款。我一直向别人称赞它，认为它确实是最好的。
cleaning_note: 五星正文包含明确硬件故障和售后未回复，不能因星级或总体推荐而删除这些负面事实。

body_original: This little machine works great! We had a lot of fun with this at our annual family Christmas party. Two family members asked me where I got it because they want one.
body_zh: 这台小机器非常好用！在一年一度的家庭圣诞聚会上，我们用它玩得很开心。有两位家人问我是在哪里买的，因为他们也想要一台。
cleaning_note: 无须清洗；按原文直译。

body_original: We are extremely pleased with this acquisition. It was exceptionally well-received at my 56th birthday celebration, engaging everyone of all ages. The audio fidelity was remarkably clear, comparable to a Bose system, and the microphone range proved to be outstanding.
body_zh: 我们对这次购买非常满意。在我的56岁生日庆祝活动上，它非常受欢迎，让各个年龄段的人都参与了进来。声音清晰度非常出色，评论者认为可与Bose系统相比，麦克风的使用范围也很优秀。
cleaning_note: 与Bose相比是评论者的主观评价，译文保留归因，不写成客观性能结论。
